name.ja: ヘルシィ・シャンロン

summoning_condition.en: You can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. If you do, its original ATK becomes 1000.

requirement.en: During the turn you Normal Summoned this card.

effect.en: Send 1 monster from your field to the Graveyard. Then, you can add 1 Level 7 or higher Pyro Type monster or 1 "A Throw Thanks to Good Health!" from your Graveyard to your hand. This turn, you cannot activate the effect of "Healthie Shanlong".
